note: Hand-encoded from NEPQA-2025 Section 1.4. Reference rubric only, not source data. Requirements are paraphrased; consult the original for exact wording.

required_documents.requirement: Test certificate to IEC 61727:2004 (utility interface characteristics), from an IECEE/IECRE-listed body
Test certificate to IEC 62116:2014 (islanding prevention test procedure), from an IECEE/IECRE-listed body
Test certificate to IEC 62891:2020 (MPPT efficiency of grid-connected inverters), from an IECEE/IECRE-listed body
Test certificate to IEC 62109-1:2010 AND IEC 62109-2:2011 (safety: general + inverter-particular), from an IECEE/IECRE-listed body
Importer-manufacturer agreement, signed and stamped, stating the PV inverter warranty period
Catalogue and technical datasheet of the PV inverter

technical_requirements.requirement: Euro efficiency ≥ 94% (≤5kVA) / ≥ 96% (>5kVA), transformerless; efficiency-vs-output curve provided
No-load loss < 1.5% of rated power (transformer topology)
Total harmonic distortion (THD) < 5% at full load
Power factor > 0.99 at nominal power; adjustable 0.8 leading to 0.8 lagging
Built-in meter and data logger with external user interface
Internal protection: DC reverse polarity, grid fault, lightning on feeder
Cooling: fan or heat sink to avoid excessive heating

label_fields.requirement: Rated Power in Watt or VA
Input and output voltage (V) and frequency (Hz)
